course_description.overview: Circumnavigation of Funen Island on paved roads, featuring a flat profile with moderate hills and sprint opportunities.

key_segments.name: Hilly sections
key_segments.description: Moderate climbs scattered throughout the route.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging one-day race with rolling terrain demanding strong climbers and sprinters; high average speeds around 43-46 km/h.

logistics.getting_there: Fly to Odense Airport or Copenhagen; ferries to Funen; trains to Odense.
logistics.accommodation: Hotels in Odense and coastal towns on Funen.
logistics.registration_details: UCI-registered teams only; elite men category.
logistics.bike_logistics: Standard road bike; service course for pro teams.
logistics.local_considerations: Cool spring weather; flat Danish landscape with coastal views.

final_verdict.one_liner: Historic Danish road classic with 130+ years of tradition and solid UCI competition.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Elite road racers seeking a prestigious European one-day event.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes for pros; spectator-friendly with high-speed action.
pro_tips: Prepare for rolling hills and fast pace.
Expect Danish hospitality and flat coastal roads.
Follow UCI Europe Tour for live updates.
